title: Audit & re-classify internal vs external leads — schema-corrected
brief:
PREVIOUS RUN HAD A SCHEMA BUG: it referenced ghl_leads.contact, but the actual column is ghl_leads.contact_data (jsonb). Re-do with corrected schema below.

VERIFIED LIVE SCHEMA (public.ghl_leads):
- id text, contact_id text, name text, first_name text, last_name text, email text, phone text, source text
- pipeline_id text, pipeline_stage_id text, status text
- monetary_value numeric, tags text[]
- contact_data jsonb  -- this is what was referenced as `contact` before — FIX IT
- raw_data jsonb
- ghl_created_at timestamptz, ghl_updated_at timestamptz, synced_at timestamptz, created_at timestamptz, updated_at timestamptz
- attorney_account_id uuid (FK -> attorney_accounts.id)
- casesdaily_lead_id uuid (FK -> casesdaily_leads.id)

casesdaily_leads has columns including `landing_page_url text` and `referrer_url text` (per migration 20260330_merge_funnel_leads_into_casesdaily.sql).

casesdaily_domains has columns `domain text`, `is_active boolean`.

Goal unchanged: (1) audit SQL that finds leads whose isInternal/mediaBuyer classification disagrees with the URL truth; (2) updated enrich.ts that uses URL → internal-domain lookup to override the heuristic when a casesdailyLeadId is present.

Seed internal domain list: 'casesdaily.com' plus all rows from casesdaily_domains where is_active = true. Match landing_page_url OR referrer_url against any of those domains as the host (or as a suffix `.<domain>`).

For the enrich.ts patch, accept an optional input map keyed by ghl_leads.id with { landingPageUrl, referrerUrl, internalDomains: string[] }, so enrichOpp can take that as injected context. The caller (data.ts) will join casesdaily_leads on its own.
outputContract:
Markdown response with:
1. **Findings & assumptions** (short)
2. **Audit SQL** — single ```sql block, must reference ghl_leads.contact_data NOT ghl_leads.contact. SELECT-only.
3. **Enrichment patch** — full file:
   ```typescript
   // FILE: casesdaily/src/lib/ghl/enrich.ts
   <full file>
   ```
4. **Edge cases**.
